name: The Ensemble
subtitle: you-plus-the-parish · the collective reader

ultimate_ability.label: We Remember · Together
ultimate_ability.description: Once per game. The ensemble responds to every name read this turn regardless of order: every arrival-hint fires early, every reading connects with its subject one step further. The room is the room only when the whole room reads.

notes: The Ensemble hand for the Judgement arcana. THE CALL is the second stat (renamed FAMILY WEIGHT / THE HARD CALL per scenario). Scenarios: everyone_stays (canonical), the_family_plot_visit (easier), the_reading_of_the_hard_names (hardest second-hour).
